objective: Recover from TRUE_EXHAUSTED by restoring usable learning flow and meeting statistical gates

steps.description: Execute targeted probe campaign: place 8-12 shadow probe trades across trend and rebound and any under-sampled setups; mark isProbe=true and track outcomes.
steps.expected_effect: Generate >=1 promotable successful probe to reach fullTradeCount >=5

steps.description: Promote up to 3 well-performing shadow probes to full trade mode (policy: promotionSource=shadow_track_record), observing guardrails.
Analyze recent time-exit causes and consider small holding period extension for probe trades to reduce neutral outcomes.
Audit contaminated exclusions; where safe, run sanitized re-analysis on a copy to recover non-synthetic valid samples.
Run audit (node scripts/audit_learning_signals.js) and classifier (classifySignalState) and produce machine-readable report. If passes gates, allow optimization miners to re-run.

risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Require human review before promotion; only promote probes with multiple independent positive signals

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Probe volume insufficient or probes biased
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Distribute probes across symbols and setupTypes; cap per-symbol probes at 2
